summary: Results-driven Engineering Manager with 16+ years of experience in production engineering and SRE leadership, driving 99.9% SLA compliance and leveraging AI/ML for automation, seeking a Platform Enablement role to optimize product-to-support lifecycle.

details: Drove operational efficiency from 85% to 98% through systematic process improvements and automation initiatives
